info.description: Home-page banner, footer links, social icons, and copyright. Editors: use the banner fields at the top only.

logo.description: Site logo shown in the header and footer. Upload an SVG or PNG.

topBanner.description: Banner message on the home page. Use **double asterisks** for bold text.

topBannerLink.description: Optional URL the banner links to when clicked (leave empty for text-only).

topBannerEnabled.description: Turn the home-page banner on or off.

nav.description: The main navigation menu shown in the header and footer. Reorder rows to reorder the menu.

footerLinks.description: Links shown in the footer (e.g. Privacy Policy, Terms).

socialLinks.description: Social media links. Use the platform name (LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, X, Seeking Alpha, StockTwits) as the Label so the correct icon shows.

copyright.description: Copyright line shown at the bottom of every page.
